name: Event & Conference Tracker
description: Track upcoming events, conferences, and meetups in your field

agents.name: Event Scanner
agents.purpose: Scan for upcoming events and conferences
agents.system_prompt_hint: Search for upcoming conferences, meetups, and events in the specified field. Find dates, locations, speakers, ticket prices, and registration deadlines. Check Eventbrite, Meetup, and industry sites.

agents.name: Event Curator
agents.system_prompt_hint: Create a curated list of upcoming events organized by date. Include: event name, date, location, cost, key speakers, and relevance score. Highlight early-bird deadlines and free events.

author: agentfactory
